law.text:
Article 1. Definitions

par. 1. For the purposes of this Act, the following definitions apply:

(1) alien: any person who does not provide proof that they possess Belgian nationality.

(3) third-country national: any person who is not a Union citizen and who is not a person enjoying the Community right of free movement, as defined in Article 2, point 5, of the Schengen Borders Code.

(4) illegal residence: the presence on the territory of an alien who does not or no longer meets the conditions for entry to or residence on the territory.

(11) risk of absconding: the fact that there are reasons to believe that an alien who is the subject of a removal procedure, a procedure for the granting of international protection, or a procedure for determining or transferring to the Member State responsible for examining the application for international protection, will abscond, having regard to the criteria listed in paragraph 2.

(14) identified alien: any alien:
(a) who is in possession of a valid travel document, a valid passport, or a valid identity document; or
(b) who has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country, which has declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer; or
(c) who falls within the category of nationalities for which the minister may personally issue a laissez-passer.

par. 2. The risk of absconding referred to in paragraph 1, (11), must be current and real. It is established following an individual examination and on the basis of one or more of the following objective criteria, taking into account all circumstances specific to each case:

(1) The person concerned has not submitted a residence application following their illegal entry or during their illegal residence, or has not made their application for international protection within the time limit provided for by this Act.

(2) The person concerned has used false or misleading information or false or falsified documents in the context of a procedure for international protection, residence, removal, or refusal of entry, or has committed fraud or used other unlawful means.

(3) The person concerned does not cooperate or has not cooperated in the context of their relations with the authorities responsible for the implementation of and/or supervision of compliance with the regulations concerning access to the territory, residence, establishment, and removal of aliens.

(4) The person concerned has made clear that they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, one of the following measures:
(a) a transfer, refusal-of-entry, or removal measure;
(b) an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended;
(c) a measure less coercive than a deprivation of liberty measure aimed at guaranteeing their transfer, refusal of entry, or removal, regardless of whether it is a liberty-restricting measure or another measure;
(d) a liberty-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security;
(e) a measure taken by another Member State equivalent to the measures referred to in (a), (b), (c), or (d).

(5) The person concerned is the subject of an entry ban in the Kingdom and/or in another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

(6) The person concerned has, immediately after having been the subject of a decision refusing entry or residence or a decision terminating their residence, or immediately after having been the subject of a refusal-of-entry or removal measure, submitted a new residence application or a new application for international protection.

(7) While being questioned on that point, the person concerned concealed the fact that they had already provided their fingerprints in another State bound by the European regulations concerning the determination of the State responsible for examining an application for international protection, after having submitted an application for international protection.

(8) The person concerned has submitted multiple applications for international protection and/or residence applications in the Kingdom or in one or more other Member States, which have given rise to a negative decision or which have not resulted in the issuance of a residence permit.

(9) While being questioned on that point, the person concerned concealed the fact that they had previously submitted an application for international protection in another State bound by the European regulations concerning the determination of the State responsible for examining an application for international protection.

(10) The person concerned has declared, or it appears from their file, that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an application for international protection or a residence application.

(11) The person concerned is the subject of a fine because they submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

kb_used.fo:
vocabulary V {
  type Person
  type Document
  type MemberState
  type Procedure
  is_alien: Person -> Bool
  lacks_proof_of_belgian_nationality: Person -> Bool
  is_third_country_national: Person -> Bool
  in_illegal_residence: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_removal_procedure: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_international_protection_procedure: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_dublin_transfer_procedure: Person -> Bool
  individual_examination_performed: Person -> Bool
  no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry: Person -> Bool
  no_international_protection_application_in_time: Person -> Bool
  used_false_information_or_documents: Person -> Bool
  committed_fraud_or_unlawful_means: Person -> Bool
  does_not_cooperate_with_authorities: Person -> Bool
  declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_transfer_measure: Person -> Bool
  declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_entry_ban: Person -> Bool
  declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure: Person -> Bool
  declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_liberty_restricting_measure: Person -> Bool
  declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_state_measure: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban_in_kingdom: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban_in_member_state: Person -> Bool
  submitted_new_application_immediately_after_negative_decision: Person -> Bool
  concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_dublin_state: Person -> Bool
  submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome: Person -> Bool
  concealed_prior_international_protection_application: Person -> Bool
  came_for_purposes_other_than_stated_application: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal: Person -> Bool
  possesses_valid_travel_document: Person -> Bool
  recognised_as_national_by_home_authority: Person -> Bool
  falls_within_ministerial_laissez_passer_nationality_category: Person -> Bool
  at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met: Person -> Bool
  is_identified_alien: Person -> Bool
  risk_of_absconding: Person -> Bool
}

theory T:V {
  ! p in Person: ((is_alien(p))) <=> ((lacks_proof_of_belgian_nationality(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((possesses_valid_travel_document(p))) => ((is_identified_alien(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((recognised_as_national_by_home_authority(p))) => ((is_identified_alien(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((falls_within_ministerial_laissez_passer_nationality_category(p))) => ((is_identified_alien(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((no_international_protection_application_in_time(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((used_false_information_or_documents(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((committed_fraud_or_unlawful_means(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((does_not_cooperate_with_authorities(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_transfer_measure(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_entry_ban(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_liberty_restricting_measure(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_state_measure(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban_in_kingdom(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban_in_member_state(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((submitted_new_application_immediately_after_negative_decision(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_dublin_state(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((concealed_prior_international_protection_application(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((came_for_purposes_other_than_stated_application(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((individual_examination_performed(p)) & (at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p)) & ((subject_to_removal_procedure(p)) | (subject_to_international_protection_procedure(p)) | (subject_to_dublin_transfer_procedure(p))))) => ((risk_of_absconding(p))).
}

case.text: Dana is a foreign national and is the subject of a removal procedure. In her residence application she used false documents.

questions.text: Can this be an objective criterion for risk of absconding pursuant to Article 1, paragraph 2, point 2?

expected.reason: Risk of absconding can be established using one or more objective criteria; use of false documents in a residence/removal procedure is listed as criterion 2.

is_alien.name: is_alien
is_alien.description: The person qualifies as an alien under the statutory definition: any person who does not provide proof that they possess Belgian nationality.

lacks_proof_of_belgian_nationality.name: lacks_proof_of_belgian_nationality
lacks_proof_of_belgian_nationality.description: The person does not provide proof that they possess Belgian nationality.

is_third_country_national.name: is_third_country_national
is_third_country_national.description: The person is not a Union citizen and not a person enjoying the Community right of free movement.

in_illegal_residence.name: in_illegal_residence
in_illegal_residence.description: The person is present on the territory without meeting the conditions for entry or residence.

subject_to_removal_procedure.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
subject_to_removal_procedure.description: The person is subject to a removal procedure.

subject_to_international_protection_proc.name: subject_to_international_protection_procedure
subject_to_international_protection_proc.description: The person is subject to a procedure for the granting of international protection.

subject_to_dublin_transfer_procedure.name: subject_to_dublin_transfer_procedure
subject_to_dublin_transfer_procedure.description: The person is subject to a procedure for determining or transferring to the Member State responsible for examining the application for international protection.

individual_examination_performed.name: individual_examination_performed
individual_examination_performed.description: An individual examination has been performed in respect of the person.

no_residence_application_after_illegal_e.name: no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry
no_residence_application_after_illegal_e.description: The person has not submitted a residence application following illegal entry or during illegal residence.

no_international_protection_application_.name: no_international_protection_application_in_time
no_international_protection_application_.description: The person has not made an application for international protection within the statutory time limit.

used_false_information_or_documents.name: used_false_information_or_documents
used_false_information_or_documents.description: The person has used false or misleading information or false or falsified documents in a relevant procedure.

committed_fraud_or_unlawful_means.name: committed_fraud_or_unlawful_means
committed_fraud_or_unlawful_means.description: The person has committed fraud or used other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

does_not_cooperate_with_authorities.name: does_not_cooperate_with_authorities
does_not_cooperate_with_authorities.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with the authorities responsible for access, residence, establishment, and removal regulations.

declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_tr.name: declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_transfer_measure
declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_tr.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with or has already failed to comply with a transfer, refusal-of-entry, or removal measure.

declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_en.name: declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_entry_ban
declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_en.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with or has already failed to comply with an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_le.name: declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure
declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_le.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with or has already failed to comply with a less coercive measure aimed at guaranteeing transfer, refusal of entry, or removal.

declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_li.name: declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_liberty_restricting_measure
declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_li.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with or has already failed to comply with a liberty-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security.

declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_eq.name: declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_state_measure
declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_eq.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with or has already failed to comply with a measure taken by another Member State equivalent to the listed measures.

subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban_in_kingdom.name: subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban_in_kingdom
subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban_in_kingdom.description: The person is subject to an entry ban in the Kingdom that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban_in_member_.name: subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban_in_member_state
subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban_in_member_.description: The person is subject to an entry ban in another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

submitted_new_application_immediately_af.name: submitted_new_application_immediately_after_negative_decision
submitted_new_application_immediately_af.description: Immediately after a decision refusing entry or residence, terminating residence, or a refusal-of-entry or removal measure, the person submitted a new residence or international protection application.

concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_dublin_s.name: concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_dublin_state
concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_dublin_s.description: When questioned, the person concealed that they had already provided fingerprints in another Dublin-bound State after submitting an international protection application there.

submitted_multiple_applications_with_neg.name: submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome
submitted_multiple_applications_with_neg.description: The person has submitted multiple international protection and/or residence applications in the Kingdom or other Member States that resulted in negative decisions or no residence permit.

concealed_prior_international_protection.name: concealed_prior_international_protection_application
concealed_prior_international_protection.description: When questioned, the person concealed that they had previously submitted an international protection application in another Dublin-bound State.

came_for_purposes_other_than_stated_appl.name: came_for_purposes_other_than_stated_application
came_for_purposes_other_than_stated_appl.description: The person declared or it appears from their file that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an application.

subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_.name: subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_.description: The person is subject to a fine because they submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

possesses_valid_travel_document.name: possesses_valid_travel_document
possesses_valid_travel_document.description: The person is in possession of a valid travel document, valid passport, or valid identity document.

recognised_as_national_by_home_authority.name: recognised_as_national_by_home_authority
recognised_as_national_by_home_authority.description: The person has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country, which has declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer.

falls_within_ministerial_laissez_passer_.name: falls_within_ministerial_laissez_passer_nationality_category
falls_within_ministerial_laissez_passer_.description: The person falls within the category of nationalities for which the minister may personally issue a laissez-passer.

at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met.name: at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met
at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met.description: At least one of the objective criteria listed in paragraph 2 for risk of absconding is established for the person.

is_identified_alien.name: is_identified_alien
is_identified_alien.description: The person qualifies as an identified alien under the statutory definition.

risk_of_absconding.name: risk_of_absconding
risk_of_absconding.description: There is a legally established risk of absconding in respect of the person.

routing.question: Can this be an objective criterion for risk of absconding pursuant to Article 1, paragraph 2, point 2?

symbolic_intent_routing.question: Can this be an objective criterion for risk of absconding pursuant to Article 1, paragraph 2, point 2?

pipeline.natural_language: Yes. Dana: There is a legally established risk of absconding in respect of the person.
